headline: Ulta Beauty CMO on Evolving a 47 Million-Member Loyalty Program into a ‘Relationship Engine’
summary: Ulta Beauty Chief Marketing Officer Kelly Mahoney explained that the company’s massive loyalty program, which has grown from 17 million members 11 years ago to 47 million today, is now viewed internally as a relationship engine. To help customers navigate an overwhelming number of choices, Ulta utilizes a proprietary algorithmic recommendation system known as a "beauty graph" to anticipate needs and curate highly personalized experiences.

summary: Starting July 12, Ulta will carry Bath & Body Works candles, body care, and home fragrance products in the U.S. and online

headline: Bath & Body Works to launch at Ulta Beauty
summary: A curated collection of products will be available at over 600 locations, and the scent Juniper Breeze will return as a limited-time exclusive for the beauty retailer.

headline: Bath & Body Works to Enter Ulta Beauty
